title: Torus orbifolds with two fixed points
author_string: Alastair Darby, Shintaro Kuroki, Jongbaek Song
journal: Algebraic Topology and Related Topics, Trends in Mathematics (2019) 67--85
journal_ref: Algebraic Topology and Related Topics, Trends in Mathematics (2019) 67--85
abstract: The main objects of this paper are torus orbifolds that have exactly two fixed points. We study the equivariant topological type of these orbifolds and consider when we can use the results of the paper [DKS] (arXiv:1809.03678) to compute its integral equivariant cohomology, in terms of generators and relations, coming from the corresponding orbifold torus graph.
